{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Champion's Guild testing
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The first test of the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]] involves pairing boys against each other to fight until one is beaten bloody.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c9">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire events]]
